users.title: Identities
operations: Look up a user by ID or UPN
Assign or remove licenses and roles

mutate.title: Randomize an attribute
mutate.description: Picks one attribute at random (from the set {{attributes}}) and overwrites it with a random value on every identity listed above (when Identities is enabled). Manager and Sponsors are excluded because they reference other directory objects rather than plain values.

mail.title: Mail
operations: Send a new mail message as a mailbox

mutate.title: Randomize mailbox activity
mutate.description: For each selected mailbox, performs one random action: send a new message (30%), reply to an inbox message (35%), forward one to another selected user (30%), or move one to Deleted Items (5%). Random subject and body text come from OpenRouter when a key is configured, otherwise a GUID.

calendar.title: Calendar
operations: Create a calendar event with attendees

files.title: Files
operations: Upload a document to a user's OneDrive
Upload a document to a SharePoint site library
Remove a document from OneDrive or SharePoint
